description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a matte black synthetic full stock and a metallic receiver. The barrel is long and features a vented rib along the top, which aids in aiming and heat dissipation. The fore-end is robust and textured, likely for improved grip during operation. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The shotgun appears to be a pump-action model, as indicated by the visible pump mechanism beneath the barrel.
description: A modern, matte black pump-action shotgun with a full stock, vented rib barrel, and a robust, textured fore-end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the full stock, receiver, vented rib barrel, and pump fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrels and vented rib, with the pump fore-end visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the full stock, receiver, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the full stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
